members.name: hasSubMenu
members.description:
Show a chevron without slotting an actual sub-menu (visual-only hint).
If a <ds-action-menu slot="sub-menu"> is slotted, the chevron appears
automatically regardless of this prop.

members.name: shortcut
members.description:
Keyboard shortcut hint shown in the trailing area (e.g. "⌘K").
Ignored when a sub-menu caret is visible.

members.name: isIndented
members.description:
Reserves a 24 px indent column on the left for alignment in
selection-group menus (radio / checkbox style). When combined
with `isChecked`, a checkmark is shown in that column.
Auto-set by `<ds-action-menu>` when any sibling item is checked.

members.name: isChecked
members.description: Renders a checkmark in the indent column. Requires `isIndented`.

members.name: showIconWrap
members.description:
Controls whether the 24 px leading-icon column is rendered.
Auto-set by `<ds-action-menu>`: true if any sibling has a leading icon,
false when the whole menu is icon-less (avoids phantom left indent).

members.name: selectionType
members.description:
How selection behaves — set automatically by the parent
`<ds-action-menu-group>` based on its own selection-type.
Drives the ARIA role: menuitemcheckbox vs menuitemradio vs menuitem.

declarations.description: Horizontal divider for grouping items inside an <ds-action-menu>.
declarations.name: DsActionMenuSeparator

members.name: styles
members.default: [ resetStyles, css` :host { display: block; padding: var(--ds-spacing-spacing-02) 0; } .line { width: 100%; height: 1px; background: var(--ds-border-border-default); } `, ]

declarations.description:
Logical grouping of items inside a <ds-action-menu>.

- Provides role="group" for assistive technology.
- title — renders a section label above the items (aria-label on the group).
- selection-type="checkbox" — items toggle independently.
- selection-type="radio" — selecting one item unchecks all others in the group.
- selection-type="none" (default) — purely action group; no check state.

The separator and title visibility are managed automatically by the parent
<ds-action-menu> once it knows how many groups exist.
declarations.name: DsActionMenuGroup

members.name: hasSeparator
members.description: Automatically set by <ds-action-menu>. True for every group except the first.

members.name: size
members.description: Item height: md = 40 px (cozy), sm = 32 px (compact).

members.name: _getOwnItems
members.description:
Returns all ds-action-menu-item elements that belong to this menu —
both direct children and those inside ds-action-menu-group elements —
while excluding items that belong to nested sub-menus.

members.name: _configureGroups
members.description:
Auto-assigns hasSeparator to groups: first group never gets one,
every subsequent group does.

members.name: _updateIndentation
members.description:
If any group in the menu has a selection-type (checkbox/radio), all items
across the entire menu get the indent column for visual alignment.
Within each group, only checked items show the checkmark.

- has-separator — automatically set by the parent menu on every group
  except the first.

declarations.description:
A split button composing a text/icon action and a menu-trigger icon button
side-by-side. The left half fires `ds-button-click`; the right chevron
fires `ds-menu-click`.

Variants:
  primary  — solid brand fill (default)
  tertiary — transparent with 1px border

Types:
  text — left half shows a text label (default slot)
  icon — left half shows an icon (icon slot, square, no label)
declarations.name: DsSplitButton

declarations.description:
Composite typography utility classes — one class per Figma text style.
Adopt into a shadow root via static styles to use class="text-*" on
inner elements, mirroring Figma's single-name text-style assignment.

} to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } @keyframes ds-tooltip-in-bottom { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-4px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } @keyframes ds-tooltip-in-left { from { opacity: 0; members.name: align
members.description: Where the bubble appears relative to the trigger. Default: 'top'.

members.name: closeOnActivation
members.description: Close the tooltip when the trigger is activated (click, Enter, Space).

members.name: enterDelayMs
members.description: Milliseconds to wait before showing the tooltip. Default: 100.

members.name: leaveDelayMs
members.description: Milliseconds to wait before hiding the tooltip. Default: 300.

members.name: mousePointer
members.description:
When true, the bubble follows the mouse cursor using fixed positioning
instead of being anchored to the trigger's bounding box.

members.name: onlyWhenTruncated
members.description:
When true, the tooltip only opens if the slotted trigger element is
currently overflowing (i.e. its text is visually truncated). Useful
for text cells that only need a tooltip when their content is clipped.

members.name: shortcut
members.description:
Optional keyboard shortcut displayed inside the tooltip bubble as a
<kbd> badge. Example values: "⌘K", "Ctrl+C", "⌥⇧F".
